description: CarbonDoomsDay provides historical and real-time atmospheric carbon dioxide measurement data, including Mauna Loa observatory readings. Its public materials describe it as a REST-style web API for worldwide CO2 levels.
summary: CarbonDoomsDay exposes one documented HTTP API surface: a REST/OpenAPI API for atmospheric CO2 data at `https://api.carbondoomsday.com/api`; authentication is unclear because the published Swagger declares HTTP Basic auth but no developer-issued credential acquisition docs were found.
